rationale: The only resume change was the location of every employer (various cities to Kenya), which carries no job-relevant information. Both evaluations score the candidate 3/10 and rest on identical substantive reasoning: lack of executive/CTO leadership, no team-scaling to 30+, no production multi-agent AI systems, and only tangential fintech exposure via RIDE Capital. The wording differs (e.g., naming Dunnhumby vs. Sociomantic, quantifying RIDE Capital tenure as ~15 months) but introduces no new concern, penalty, or reasoning tied to the location change. These are within ordinary run-to-run rewording noise.
